root.speaker: npc
root.text: Cho hoi sap con oi khong?

options.label: Da con, oi gion, khong hat a!
Con nhung hoi mem roi a.

ask_soft.speaker: npc
ask_soft.text: Mem thi thoi, ban re toi mua an lien vay.

options.label: Da duoc, con can cho co/chu!
Da het roi a, xin loi.

ask_amount.speaker: npc
ask_amount.text: Vay can cho toi 0.6 ky nhe.

options.label: Da con can lien cho co/chu!

leaf_buy_small.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_small.text: Cho 0.4 ky thoi, an thu truoc da nghe.

leaf_buy_medium.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_medium.text: 0.6 ky, can chuan tay vo nha!

leaf_decline_price.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_price.text: Mac qua, thoi de toi xem sap khac.

leaf_decline_stock.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_stock.text: Thoi vay, lan sau ghe lai mua.
